name: UNDERTOW - Sci-Fi RPG
description:
Underneath the icy surface of Cardis' third moon lies an endless sea.
Further below still lies an abyssal city of pirates and vagabonds.
You are here.

...

Welcome to THE UNDERTOW, home to some of the most ruthless, desperate, vicious people in the galaxy. Tucked beneath the ice-layered sheet of Cardis-III's cruel surface, and only accessible via deep-sea submarine, lies a sprawling city that used to be the second-most prosperous colony within an eight-system radius. Now, it's first-place to the Black Market, but dead-last to anyone outside.

Parked within the sea's abyss around 500 meters above crush depth, The Undertow used to be a simple mining facility, but- under the guidance of Charles Right- the outpost grew to be much more. The mining facility was soon bought out by a rival company, who then brought in a mercenary company to stand guard. That mercenary then staged a coup to overthrow their employers after a pay dispute, overthrew their employers, invited black market merchants to help make ends meet... and then it became a pirate haven for years to come, completely defended by the planet's surface with an atmosphere patrolled by privateers.

Outside the system lies a vast war, waged by two fronts; the Greater Solar Union (GSU) including the forces of Earth, and the Marche-Donir Coalition (MDC). The war has proved quite profitable for the pirates of The Undertow, and- as such- they have begun offering jobs and selling lucrative cargo to anyone and everyone who has a heavy pocket... assuming you can worm your way out of getting scammed.

You are a rando in a sea of randos. You came in by ship, and went under the surface by way of a sub shared with various people of various species. Whether you are a refugee, fiend, merchant, politician, adventurer, convict, kidnappee...
You are here.

...

hi welcome to my first ai thing i hope you like it :) concept is inspired by Barotrauma and Starsector. art from starsector too hi

Tags: scifi, sci-fi, alien, water, underwater, space
creator: ClearlyFake5
